topic: Research the architecture and v1 contract for the standalone local AI document diff skill

focus: Canonical representations and format adapters survey
noveltyJustification: First pass; all findings are new to this packet
keyQuestions: Q1: Which canonical representation and adapters?

ruledOut.reason: Loses document structure; structural tokenization is required

focus: Diff algorithms and format adapter libraries deep dive
noveltyJustification: Confirmed jsdiff extensibility from iter-1 and identified concrete libraries (mammoth, cheerio, remark) with exact APIs for each format tier
answeredQuestions: Q2: Myers via jsdiff for v1 core, histogram as upgrade path

ruledOut.approach: Custom markdown parser instead of remark/mdast
ruledOut.reason: remark/mdast is the established ecosystem standard with plugin support
cheerio is lighter, faster, and sufficient for structural extraction

noveltyJustification: Designed complete snapshot state machine with content-addressed storage, retention policy, atomicity, security, and concurrency
keyQuestions: Q3: Which snapshot lifecycle is safe and predictable?
answeredQuestions: Q3: Content-addressed SHA-256 snapshots with 30-day LRU retention, atomic writes, explicit-pair fallback

ruledOut.reason: Overkill for v1; flat file index is simpler and more portable
Loses data on crash; disk-first with atomic writes is safer

noveltyJustification: Concrete visual encoding, CSP specification, fidelity dashboard, keyboard navigation model
keyQuestions: Q4: How should the HTML report expose fidelity and risk?
answeredQuestions: Q4: Self-contained dual-mode HTML with CSP script-src none, fidelity dashboard, keyboard nav

focus: Portable core and skill interface design
noveltyJustification: TypeScript interface design for two-layer architecture, complete CLI contract, specific dependency choices
keyQuestions: Q5: Which portable core and skill interface?
answeredQuestions: Q5: Two-layer architecture: portable npm core + OpenCode skill wrapper; full TypeScript API defined

noveltyJustification: PDF extraction heuristics, adapter interface contract, format detection matrix
First systematic security analysis with threat vectors, severity ratings, and mitigations; dependency audit
answeredQuestions: Q7: diff+mammoth+cheerio+remark+pdf-parse all BSD/MIT, actively maintained

noveltyJustification: First quantification of acceptance criteria with specific numerical targets and ~33 fixture pairs
Consolidated architecture diagram, technology stack table, phase map are new synthesized artifacts
answeredQuestions: Q1: Structured token model with sections[], fidelity scoring, format-specific adapters

focus: Gap analysis and remaining open questions
noveltyJustification: Systematic gap analysis, edge-case handling table, all 7 primary questions now answered with evidence
